hooks.summary: Block credential-like content written into the resolved project test root.

bindings.note: Bash path: scans command text for explicit credential-like literals when the command writes into the resolved test root; external file copies remain outside this guard.

Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0, 0.145.0-alpha.18, and 0.146.0-alpha.3.1. Built-in file edits surface as matcher Write with tool_name apply_patch; the guard scans added patch lines for credential-like literals targeting the resolved test root.
Bash path: blocks shell write targets that resolve to feedback-rules.json.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0, 0.145.0-alpha.18, and 0.146.0-alpha.3.1. Built-in apply_patch edits are blocked when they target feedback-rules.json.

hooks.summary: Append every shell command and output to execution-log.md for L2 audit.
Inject post-completion checklist after results.json is written.

bindings.note: Bash path: infers shell write targets and emits checklist additionalContext after commands that write results.json under the resolved test root.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0, 0.145.0-alpha.18, and 0.146.0-alpha.3.1. Built-in apply_patch writes to results.json emit the same checklist additionalContext.

hooks.summary: Validate results schema v1/v2/v3 compatibility, run-local evidence and proven basis, gate semantics, package DoD, coverage, overrides, and release readiness.

bindings.note: Bash path: re-reads results.json after shell writes and emits validation errors or advisories via additionalContext.

Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0, 0.145.0-alpha.18, and 0.146.0-alpha.3.1. Built-in apply_patch writes to results.json emit the same validation errors or advisories via additionalContext.

hooks.summary: Protect project-level derived views unless merge lockfile is present.

bindings.note: Bash path: blocks shell write targets that resolve into protected project-level derived views.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0, 0.145.0-alpha.18, and 0.146.0-alpha.3.1. Built-in apply_patch edits are blocked when they target protected derived views.

hooks.summary: Require tester registration artifacts before strategy-plan.md is accepted.

bindings.note: Bash path: checks strategy-plan.md writes after shell commands and emits registration warnings via additionalContext.
Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0, 0.145.0-alpha.18, and 0.146.0-alpha.3.1. Built-in apply_patch writes to strategy-plan.md emit the same registration warnings via additionalContext.

hooks.summary: Prevent testers from writing into other testers' run directories.

bindings.note: Bash path: enforcement depends on a session file keyed to the current Codex Bash parent PID.

Write path: runtime-verified on codex-cli 0.125.0, 0.145.0-alpha.18, and 0.146.0-alpha.3.1 for built-in apply_patch. Enforcement still depends on the same session file contract keyed to the hook parent PID.

hooks.summary: [DELEGATED] Verify daemon port binding after startup through a project-specific check.

claude.note: Requires project-specific daemon binary/port patterns. Not implementable as generic skill hook.

hooks.summary: [DELEGATED] Numeric-claim traceability remains an L4/L2 semantic review because generic automation has unacceptable false positives.

claude.note: Distinguishing 'numeric claim' from 'step number' requires NLP-level analysis. Better as template standard.

hooks.summary: [DELEGATED] Periodic canary/sampler health is handled by the longrun procedure because hooks have no portable periodic lifecycle.

claude.note: CronCreate exists for prompts but not hooks. No session-idle or periodic-tick lifecycle event.
